name: AnalysisLoadCombination
summary: The AnalysisLoadCombination class contains information related to analysis load combinations.

constructors.name: AnalysisLoadCombination
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisLoadCombination class.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes an analysis load combination. The AnalysisModelName and ID have to be set.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Inserts an analysis load combination. The AnalysisModelName has to be set.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies an analysis load combination. The AnalysisModelName and ID have to be set.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects an analysis load combination. The AnalysisModelName and ID have to be set.

methods.name: SetLoads
methods.signature: public void SetLoads(List<Identifier> groupIDs, List<double> scalingFactors, List<double> reductionFactors, List<double> partialSafetyFactors)

properties.name: AnalysisModelName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model name.

properties.name: AnalysisObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the analysis object.

properties.name: FatherObject2ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObject2Type
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: FatherObjectID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: GroupIDs
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifiers of the groups of the analysis load combination.

properties.name: ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the analysis object.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name of the analysis load combination.

properties.name: PartialSafetyFactors
properties.summary: Gets or sets the partial safety factors of the analysis load combination.

properties.name: ReductionFactors
properties.summary: Gets or sets the reduction factors of the analysis load combination.

properties.name: ScalingFactors
properties.summary: Gets or sets the scaling factors of the analysis load combination.

properties.name: Type
properties.summary: Gets or sets the combination type of the analysis load combination.
